q: 관계대명사의 역할은?
o: 전치사 + 명사
접속사 + 대명사

q: 관계대명사절의 역할은?
o: 명사
형용사

q: 관계대명사절의 수식을 받는 명사를?
o: 선행사
대명사

q: 선행사가 사람일때 주격 관계대명사는?
o: who
whom

q: 선행사가 사람일때 목적격 관계대명사는?
o: whom
whose

q: 선행사가 사람일때 소유격 관계대명사는?
o: whom
whose

q: 선행사가 사물일때 주격 관계대명사는?
o: who
which

q: 선행사가 사물일때 목적격 관계대명사는?
o: who
which

q: 선행사에 관계없이 쓸수 있는 관계대명사는?
o: who
that

q: 선행사를 포함한 관계대명사는?
o: that
what

q: I like Mike. He is our math teacher.
o: I like Mike who is our math teacher.
I like Mike whom is our math teacher.

q: I know a boy. He can speak English well.
o: I know a boy who can speak English well.
I know a boy whom can speak English well.

q: I have a friend. He is a doctor.
o: I have a friend who is a doctor.
I have a friend whom is a doctor.

q: This is the man. I saw him last night.
o: This is the man who saw him last night.
This is the man whom I saw last night.

q: I met a girl. Her hair is blond.
o: I met a girl who hair is blond.
I met a girl whose hair is blond.

q: I have a dog. It always follows me.
o: I have a dog who always follows me.
I have a dog which always follows me.

q: This is the novel. Tom wrote it.
o: This is the novel which he wrote.
This is the novel who wrote it.

q: This is the man. He said so.
o: This is the man whom said so.
This is the man that said so.

q: The house is old. He lives in the house.
o: The house who lives in is old.
The house that he lives in is old.

q: The house is old. He lives in the house.
o: The house who lives in is old.
The house which he lives in is old.
